creator: michaelrmgreen@yahoo.co.uk
text:
I need the terminfo database to run MS FoxPro Unix. In the past (6.2
and earlier)I installed ncurses by going to /usr/src/contrib/ncurses
and typing './configure' [Enter].

The 'configure' output stops with the message :
config.status: error: cannot find input file: test/Makefile.in

As a workaround I have imported the terminfo database files from a 6.2 system.

Fix: 

None known.
How-To-Repeat: See above.
